message:
feat(layout): config-aware layout algorithm dispatch with graph analysis

Major layout engine enhancement propagating LayoutConfig into the
algorithm selection pipeline:

- fm-layout/lib.rs: refactor preferred_layout_algorithm into
  preferred_layout_algorithm_with_config and dispatch_layout_algorithm
  into dispatch_layout_algorithm_with_config, enabling config-driven
  algorithm selection; import articulation_points, bridges, and
  connected_components from fnx-algorithms for structural analysis;
  wire ir_to_graph adapter for fnx integration (~250 new lines)
- fm-layout/fnx_diagnostics: expand diagnostics with graph-structural
  metrics (articulation points, bridges, component analysis)
- fm-layout/fnx_directed: directed layout improvements
- fm-core/canary: expand canary analysis capabilities
- fm-core/cga, evidence: formatting and refactoring
- fm-parser: dot_parser and mermaid_parser improvements
- fm-cli tests: expand e2e scenarios, conformance, and regression
  harnesses; add 80 new FrankenTUI conformance test cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
